div1.entryFree: Violation, the act of sinning against sth.; infringement; ravishment: in double v. of sacred chastity and of promise-breach, Meas. V, 409. the v. of my faith, Wint. IV, 4, 488. v. of all faith and troth, H4A V, 1, 70. if your pure maidens fall into the hand of hot and forcing v. H5 III, 3, 21.
